They don't have a platform. They are lacking in structure and purpose in their campaign. They are lacking a united image. There's a great deal of animosity within the party between a lot of Democrats. Between Mondale, Hart and Jackson. I just don't feel the Democratic party has it together.

I like their organization. They're working as a team, presenting a solid image, honesty and integrity are their strong points. They're confident in themselves. I like the way they do business with foreign countries showing the U.S. in a strength position. They have, in Ronald Reagan, a solid leader and a president to be proud of. You know, this is the greatest nation on the face of the earth and they will help us keep it that way.
